Intro Power Inclusive Future For All Looking Ahead Power Power connectivity—and empower our communities A lot has happened in 40 years of technology: the Internet, mobile, social media, cloud computing, AI. Securely powering that technology has only grown more critical—and more complex—over time. That’s where Cisco comes in. We build and deliver technology that powers the world’s connectivity, whether that's between computers, throughout communities, or across continents. And we do so with the highest standards of ethics and integrity in mind—for ourselves, for our customers and partners, and for their users. That’s the power, and importance, of connection. FY24 Purpose Report | 11
